testcase.name: Shadow DOM page loads successfully
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed Then the page title should contain "VAULT"..................................passed And the shadow DOM container should be visible on the page..................passed

testcase.name: Shadow host element is present and accessible
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed Then a shadow host element should exist on the page.........................passed And the shadow root should be accessible....................................passed

testcase.name: Shadow DOM widgets render visible text content
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed Then the shadow DOM should contain visible text content.....................passed And the shadow content should not be empty..................................passed

testcase.name: User can type into the shadow DOM form input
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I type "ShadowTest@vault.com" into the shadow form input...............passed Then the shadow form input should contain "ShadowTest@vault.com"............passed

testcase.name: User can clear and retype in the shadow DOM form input
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I type "initial text" into the shadow form input.......................passed And I clear the shadow form input...........................................passed And I type "updated text" into the shadow form input........................passed Then the shadow form input should contain "updated text"....................passed

testcase.name: Submit button is enabled and clickable
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed Then the shadow submit button should be enabled.............................passed When I click the shadow DOM submit button...................................passed Then no JS errors should be present in the console..........................passed

testcase.name: User can fill the form and submit it
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I type "test@example.com" into the shadow form input...................passed And I click the shadow DOM submit button....................................passed Then no JS errors should be present in the console..........................passed

testcase.name: Shadow form input accepts various email formats - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I type "user@example.com" into the shadow form input...................passed Then the shadow form input should contain "user@example.com"................passed

testcase.name: Shadow form input accepts various email formats - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I type "test.user+tag@domain.org" into the shadow form input...........passed Then the shadow form input should contain "test.user+tag@domain.org"........passed

testcase.name: Shadow form input accepts various email formats - #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I type "qa_engineer@vault.io" into the shadow form input...............passed Then the shadow form input should contain "qa_engineer@vault.io"............passed

testcase.name: Counter starts at zero on page load
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed Then the shadow counter value should be "0".................................passed

testcase.name: Increment button increases the counter
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I click the increment button 3 times...................................passed Then the shadow counter value should be "3".................................passed

testcase.name: Clicking increment and decrement buttons does not throw JS errors
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I click the increment button 2 times...................................passed And I click the decrement button 1 times....................................passed Then no JS errors should be present in the console..........................passed

testcase.name: Shadow select dropdown has options available
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed Then the shadow select should have more than 1 option.......................passed

testcase.name: User can select the second option in the shadow dropdown
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I select option at index 1 from the shadow dropdown....................passed Then the shadow select should not show the default placeholder..............passed

testcase.name: User can select multiple options in sequence without errors
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I select option at index 1 from the shadow dropdown....................passed And I select option at index 2 from the shadow dropdown.....................passed Then the shadow select should not show the default placeholder..............passed And no JS errors should be present in the console...........................passed

testcase.name: Shadow DOM elements are reachable by keyboard Tab navigation
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed When I focus the page body..................................................passed And I press Tab to navigate into the shadow DOM.............................passed Then a shadow DOM element should receive focus..............................passed

testcase.name: Shadow DOM roots are accessible via JavaScript traversal
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the VAULT Shadow DOM page...............................passed Then nested shadow DOM elements should be reachable via JavaScript piercing.passed
